See `matplotlib.axes `_ for details. #### See Also {.doc-section .doc-section-see-also} ammonyte.utils.sampling.confidence_interval [[source]](https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte/blob/main/ammonyte/core/rqa_res.py#L211-L414){.source-link target="_blank"} ### confidence_smooth_plot { #ammonyte.core.rqa_res.RQARes.confidence_smooth_plot } ```python core.rqa_res.RQARes.confidence_smooth_plot( block_size, figsize=(12, 8), ax=None, transition_interval=None, color=None, label=None, xlabel=None, ylabel=None, title=None, ci_kwargs=None, background_series=None, background_kwargs=None, hline_kwargs=None, ci_plot_kwargs=None, legend=True, lgd_kwargs=None, ) ``` Function for plotting rqa results with confidence bounds #### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters} [**block_size**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Size of smoothing block to use. [**figsize**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tuple](`tuple`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [(12, 8)]{.parameter-default} : Size of the figure. Default is (12, 8). [**ax**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[matplotlib](`matplotlib`).[axes](`matplotlib.axes`).[Axes](`matplotlib.axes.Axes`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : Axes to plot on. If None, a new figure will be generated. [**transition_interval**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([list](`list`), [tuple](`tuple`))]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : Upper and lower bound for the transition interval [**color**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([str](`str`), [tuple](`tuple`))]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : String or rgb tuple to use for marker color [**label**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : the label for the Fisher Information [**xlabel**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : the label for the x-axis [**ylabel**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : the label for the y-axis [**title**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : the title for the figure [**background_series**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[pyleoclim](`pyleoclim`).[Series](`pyleoclim.Series`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : Optional to pass a different series that will be plotted behind the main series plot [**background_kwargs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : Key word arguments for the background plot. If none are passed, the color of the main plot will be re-used and alpha will be set to .2 [**hline_kwargs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : Key word arguments for the Fisher Information statistic plot. See `matplotlib.pyplot.figure `_ for details. [**ax**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[matplotlib](`matplotlib`).[axis](`matplotlib.axis`)]{.parameter-annotation} : The axis object from matplotlib. See `matplotlib.axes `_ for details. #### See Also {.doc-section .doc-section-see-also} ammonyte.utils.sampling.confidence_interval matplotlib.axes.Axes.hlines matplotlib.axes.Axes.fill_between [[source]](https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte/blob/main/ammonyte/core/rqa_res.py#L416-L606){.source-link target="_blank"} ### lerm_transitions { #ammonyte.core.rqa_res.RQARes.lerm_transitions } ```python core.rqa_res.RQARes.lerm_transitions( transition_interval=None, upper=95, lower=5, w=50, n_samples=10000, ) ``` Detect transitions using LERM Fisher Information threshold crossings This method should be applied to a Fisher Information series (RQARes object) obtained from LERM analysis, typically after smoothing. #### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters} [**transition_interval**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tuple](`tuple`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : (upper_bound, lower_bound) for detecting transitions. If None, automatically computes via bootstrapping. [**upper**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [95]{.parameter-default} : Upper percentile for confidence interval. Default is 95 Only used if transition_interval is None. [**lower**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5]{.parameter-default} : Lower percentile for confidence interval. Default is 5 Only used if transition_interval is None. [**w**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [50]{.parameter-default} : Bootstrap sample size. Default is 50 [**n_samples**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [10000]{.parameter-default} : Number of bootstrap samples. Default is 10000 #### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns} []{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[DeterministicTransitions](`ammonyte.core.transitions.DeterministicTransitions`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Object containing detected transitions with plotting methods #### Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples} Complete LERM workflow: ::: {#0ca652d1 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os, ammonyte as amt # Load data ngrip = amt.Series.from_csv(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(amt.__file__), 'data', 'NGRIP.csv')) # LERM analysis NGRIP_td = amt.TimeEmbeddedSeries(ngrip, m=11) NGRIP_epsilon = NGRIP_td.find_epsilon(eps=1, target_density=0.05) NGRIP_rm = NGRIP_epsilon['Output'] NGRIP_lp = NGRIP_rm.laplacian_eigenmaps(w_size=20, w_incre=4) NGRIP_lp_smooth = amt.utils.fisher.smooth_series(NGRIP_lp, block_size=3) # Detect transitions transitions = NGRIP_lp_smooth.lerm_transitions() print(transitions) transitions.plot() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Time axis values sorted in ascending order Time axis values sorted in ascending order Initial density is 0.0003 Initial density is not within the tolerance window, searching...
